name: subway_count
description: Number of subway entrances within 400m; source: NYC Open Data MTA subway entrances (Socrata)

name: school_count
description: Number of school locations within 400m; source: NYC Open Data NYC school locations (Socrata)

name: fqhc_count
description: Number of federally qualified health centers within 400m; scoped to Section 330 PHSA designees only; source: NYC Open Data NYC DOHMH Article 28 facility directory (Socrata)

name: library_count
description: Number of library branches within 400m; source: NYPL open data

name: park_count
description: Number of park locations within 400m; source: NYC Open Data DPR parks dataset (Socrata)

name: social_services_count
description: PROVISIONAL: Number of social service locations within 400m; retained only if Part 2.5 audit confirms adequate coverage, point-level geometry, and data recency; source: NYC Open Data social services (Socrata)

name: food_access_score
description: Tract-level food access score assigned to all stops within the same census tract; not a point count; methodological distinction documented in README; source: USDA ERS Food Access Research Atlas

name: composite_score
description: Tiered weighted sum across all amenity layers per essential destinations literature (Neutens 2015, Grengs 2010); equal-weight sensitivity baseline computed separately; derived in src/proximity.py
